> ⚠️ This repository does not accept code pull requests — there is no source code here by design.
> Source code ships inside installation packages from [Releases](../../releases) under the terms of `LICENSE`.
>
> **For documentation corrections:** open an issue tagged `docs`.  
> **For architectural proposals:** start a [Discussion](../../discussions).  
> **For bug reports:** use the [bug report template](../../issues/new?template=bug_report.md).

If you intended to submit a PR to the AngaraBase project in general, note that design input
goes through the internal RFC process after a Discussion thread reaches consensus.
